title: Liberator (Wookiees)
content:

[[File:WookieeLiberator.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Wookiee Liberator at sea (top row)]]

The '''Liberator''' was an aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] fleets. It acted as an anti-aircraft destroyer. Stationed on the forest-covered rivers and lakes of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], Liberators could protect the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] against strafing, but more importantly against bombing runs intended to defoliate the battlefield and rob the native Wookiees of their natural fighting advantage among the trees.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
